title: gladiolus debilis var. cochleatus
intro: Gladiolus debilis var. cochleatus, also known as the Cochlearia gladiolus or Snake Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its alkaloid compounds. It is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and pain relief. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
